import fitz, sys
path = 'C:/Users/bsharp/OneDrive - Godolphin/PythonScripts/ClaudeCodeProjects/cheatsheets/Stallion cheat sheets 1-8-26.pdf'

for i in range\(3, doc.page_count\):

    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(doc[i].get_text\(\).encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
" 2>&1)

from PIL import Image
import base64, io
img = Image.open\(r'C:\\Users\\bsharp\\OneDrive - Godolphin\\PythonScripts\\ClaudeCodeProjects\\cheatsheets\\D.jpg'\)
img = img.resize\(\(64, 64\), Image.LANCZOS\)
buf = io.BytesIO\(\)

b64 = base64.b64encode\(buf.getvalue\(\)\).decode\(\)
print\(len\(b64\), 'chars'\)
")

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('stallion_data.xlsx', read_only=True\)
print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\)
for sh in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sh]
    rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\)
    if rows:
        print\(f'  {sh}: {rows[0]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import urllib.request, re
url = 'https://www.darleyamerica.com/stallions/our-stallions/nyquist'
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
html = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=15\).read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='ignore'\)
idx = html.find\('Foaled'\)
if idx == -1: idx = html.find\('foaled'\)
print\('Foaled context:', repr\(html[max\(0,idx-200\):idx+400]\) if idx > -1 else 'NOT FOUND'\)
" 2>&1)
